india_trends.title: Om Power Transmission IPO subscribed 3.33 times on final day of bidding
india_trends.summary: The issue attracted bids for over 1.99 crore shares against approximately 60 lakh shares on offer, according to NSE data

india_trends.title: Om Power Transmission IPO: Issue subscribed 3.3x on Day 03; NII portion sees strong demand, GMP signals flat listing
india_trends.summary: Om Power Transmission's IPO saw strong investor interest, with a subscription rate of 3.3 times. The issue, priced between ₹166-175 per share, attracted bids for 1.99 crore shares. The company plans to use proceeds for capital expenditure and debt repayment.

india_trends.title: ICICI Pru AMC Q4 results: Profit rises 10% YoY to Rs 763 cr; co declares Rs 12.4 dividend
india_trends.summary: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Company reported 10% YoY Q4 profit growth to Rs 763 crore, driven by higher revenue and improved operating leverage. Annual earnings rose strongly, though sequential profit declined due to lower income despite controlled expenses.

india_trends.title: US stock market: Dow Jones futures drop 1% in after Trump’s Strait of Hormuz blockade warning
india_trends.summary: US stock futures indicate a gap-down start as oil prices rise following military preparations to blockade Iranian ports. Key indices are down 0.5%-1%. Tensions escalate after failed US-Iran peace talks, with Trump warning of a blockade and potential retaliation from Iran.

india_trends.title: Rajasthan highway modernisation project gets $225 million World Bank boost, to benefit 3 million people
india_trends.summary: The World Bank has approved a USD 225 million loan for Rajasthan's highway modernization. This project will benefit over 3 million people by improving road efficiency, resilience, and safety. It aims to upgrade about 800 km of highways, making them safer and climate-resilient.

india_trends.title: Sensex, Nifty fall nearly 1 per cent as US-Iran talks fail - Telangana Today
india_trends.summary: Sensex, Nifty fall nearly 1 per cent as US-Iran talks fail    Telangana Today

india_trends.title: MCX India among 4 midcap stocks that hit 52-week high; rally up to 17% in a month
india_trends.summary: Four BSE 150 Midcap Index stocks, including MCX India, hit 52-week highs even as the broader market fell, with gains of up to 17% in a month, signalling strong momentum in select midcap counters.

india_trends.title: India bonds trim losses as soft CPI spurs value buying
india_trends.summary: Indian government bonds trimmed ​most of their losses ​on Monday, as softer-than-expected inflation data drew in ​late-session buyers, tempering concerns over price pressures following oil's surge after the collapse of the U.S.-Iran peace talks.

india_trends.title: US Stock Market Today | Dow Jones | Nasdaq Live: US stock futures fall as Iran talks stall, oil surges
Sumitomo Corp JV firm Krisumi to invest Rs 4,500 cr on housing project in Gurugram
india_trends.summary: Realty firm Krisumi Corporation Ltd, a joint venture between Japan's Sumitomo Corporation and Krishna Group, will further invest around Rs 4,500 crore over the next 6-7 years on its ongoing 33.5 acre luxury housing project in Gurugram.

india_trends.title: Oil prices jump 7% to top $102/ bbl ahead of US blockade on Iran
india_trends.summary: Oil prices jumped back above $100 ​a barrel on Monday as the U.S. Navy prepared to block ships to and from Iran via the Strait of Hormuz in a move that could restrict Iranian oil exports after Washington and Tehran failed to reach a deal to end the war.

india_trends.title: ETMarkets Smart Talk| Nifty50 at 20x looks attractive, but markets are not out of the woods yet, says Ritesh Taksali
india_trends.summary: Despite recent corrections, the Nifty 50 appears reasonably valued at around 20x earnings, says Ritesh Taksali, though he warns markets are “not out of the woods yet.” Persistent risks from oil prices, inflation, and geopolitics are likely to keep volatility elevated in FY27.

india_trends.title: Basmati rice exports hit by Hormuz crisis; 4 lakh tonnes of cargo stranded right now: Abhishek Govilkar
india_trends.summary: The Strait of Hormuz crisis has severely impacted India's basmati rice exports to the Middle East, stranding four lakh tonnes of cargo and collapsing vessel traffic by over 90%. india_trends.summary: Goldman Sachs posted a rise in first-quarter profit on Monday, ​as the Wall Street bank benefited from strength in ​dealmaking and equities trading.
